name: Scientific Calculator FX-991ES Plus
description: Well-maintained scientific calculator suitable for engineering and science students. Supports advanced mathematical functions including calculus, matrices, statistics, and complex numbers. Ideal for university exams and daily coursework.

name: Arduino UNO R3 Kit
description: Complete Arduino starter kit including an Arduino UNO R3 board, sensors, jumper wires, LEDs, resistors, and a breadboard. Perfect for learning electronics, embedded systems, and IoT development.

name: Digital Signal Processing Textbook
description: Comprehensive DSP textbook covering discrete signals, systems, Fourier transforms, filtering techniques, and practical applications. Includes solved examples and detailed explanations suitable for university students.

name: Engineering Mathematics Notes
description: Complete handwritten notes covering calculus, differential equations, linear algebra, Laplace transforms, and probability theory. Organized in an easy-to-understand format with worked examples.

name: University Hoodie
description: Comfortable university-branded hoodie made from high-quality fabric. Suitable for everyday campus wear and provides excellent warmth during cold mornings and rainy weather.

name: Lab Coat
description: Clean laboratory coat suitable for science practical sessions and engineering workshops. Made from durable material and designed to provide comfort and protection during lab work.

name: Chicken Kottu Voucher
description: Meal voucher redeemable at the campus cafeteria for a freshly prepared chicken kottu. A convenient option for students looking for a quick and satisfying meal between lectures.

name: Coffee Bundle
description: Pack of premium instant coffee sachets with rich aroma and smooth flavor. Perfect for late-night study sessions, project work, and staying energized throughout the day.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: 2.4GHz wireless mouse with USB receiver and ergonomic design. Offers reliable performance, smooth tracking, and long battery life for everyday academic and professional use.

name: USB Flash Drive 64GB
description: High-speed USB 3.0 flash drive with 64GB storage capacity. Suitable for storing assignments, lecture materials, software tools, and important project files.

name: Backpack
description: Spacious backpack with multiple compartments for laptops, books, chargers, and accessories. Designed for comfort and durability, making it ideal for university students.

name: Water Bottle
description: Reusable stainless-steel water bottle designed to keep beverages cool for extended periods. Environmentally friendly, durable, and suitable for everyday campus use.

name: React Native Guide
description: Beginner-friendly guide to React Native development covering components, navigation, state management, styling, and API integration. Includes practical examples and exercises.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable Bluetooth speaker with deep bass and clear sound quality. Features wireless connectivity, rechargeable battery, and compact design for indoor and outdoor use.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: RGB mechanical keyboard featuring blue switches for a satisfying typing experience. Built with durable keycaps and customizable lighting effects, suitable for gaming and programming.

name: ESP32 Development Board
description: Powerful ESP32 development board with built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth capabilities. Ideal for IoT, home automation, smart devices, robotics, and embedded systems projects. Compatible with Arduino IDE and supports a wide range of sensors and peripherals.

name: Power Bank 10000mAh
description: Reliable 10000mAh power bank with fast charging technology and dual USB outputs. Perfect for charging smartphones, tablets, wireless earbuds, and other portable devices while traveling or during long university days.

name: Data Structures Textbook
description: Comprehensive textbook covering fundamental and advanced data structures, algorithms, complexity analysis, sorting techniques, searching methods, and practical programming examples for university students.

name: Programming in C
description: Detailed guide for learning C programming from beginner to intermediate level. Covers variables, loops, functions, arrays, pointers, structures, file handling, and problem-solving techniques with examples.

name: Denim Jacket
description: Fashionable denim jacket made from durable high-quality fabric. Suitable for casual outings, campus wear, and everyday use while providing both comfort and style.

name: Sports T-Shirt
description: Lightweight and breathable sports t-shirt designed for exercise, jogging, gym workouts, and outdoor activities. Made with moisture-wicking fabric for maximum comfort.

name: Chocolate Gift Pack
description: Premium assortment of chocolates packed in an attractive gift box. Includes a variety of flavors and textures, making it an excellent gift for friends, family, or special occasions.

name: Energy Drink Pack
description: Pack of six refreshing energy drinks formulated to provide a quick energy boost during study sessions, sports activities, or busy university schedules.

name: Laptop Sleeve 15-inch
description: Protective 15-inch laptop sleeve featuring a soft padded interior and durable exterior material. Helps protect laptops from scratches, dust, and minor impacts during transport.

name: Wireless Earbuds
description: High-quality wireless earbuds with Bluetooth connectivity, noise reduction, long battery life, and a compact charging case. Suitable for music, calls, and online learning.

name: Graphic Design Basics
description: Beginner-friendly introduction to graphic design concepts including color theory, typography, layouts, branding, and digital design tools. Includes practical examples and exercises.

name: Portable SSD 256GB
description: Fast and compact 256GB portable SSD with USB-C connectivity. Ideal for storing assignments, projects, photos, videos, and backups while offering significantly faster speeds than traditional drives.

name: Cap
description: Comfortable adjustable cap featuring an embroidered university logo. Suitable for outdoor events, sports activities, and daily casual wear.

name: Notebook Set
description: Set of five high-quality ruled notebooks suitable for lectures, assignments, project planning, and personal notes. Durable covers ensure long-lasting use.

name: LoRa Development Kit
description: Complete ESP32 and LoRa development kit designed for long-range wireless communication projects. Suitable for IoT networks, environmental monitoring systems, smart agriculture, and research applications.
